adjudication_note: Trigger point injection, 3+ muscles — 1 per encounter.
Intermediate joint injection — 1 per encounter. Separate lines per joint.
Major joint injection — 1 per encounter. Separate lines per joint.
Major joint injection with US guidance — 1 per encounter.
Open rotator cuff repair, chronic — 1 per encounter.
Total shoulder arthroplasty — 1 per encounter.
Closed treatment distal radial fracture without manipulation — 1 per encounter.
Distal radius ORIF 2 fragments — 1 per encounter. Bilateral requires separate lines.
Distal radius ORIF 3+ fragments — 1 per encounter.
THA — 1 per encounter. Bilateral requires separate lines with -LT/-RT or -50.
Open arthrotomy, knee — 1 per encounter.
Arthrotomy, knee, synovectomy — 1 per encounter.
Chondroplasty of knee add-on — 1 per encounter.
Open collateral ligament repair, knee — 1 per encounter.
ACL reconstruction — 1 per encounter.
TKA — 1 per encounter. Bilateral requires separate lines with -LT/-RT or -50.
Achilles tendon repair — 1 per encounter.
Closed treatment tibial shaft fracture without manipulation — 1 per encounter.
Closed treatment tibial shaft fracture with manipulation — 1 per encounter.
Tibial shaft fracture IM nail — 1 per encounter.
Closed treatment metatarsal fracture — up to 5 per encounter (5 metatarsals).
Long leg splint — 1 per encounter.
Short leg splint — 1 per encounter.
Ankle/foot strapping — up to 2 per encounter (bilateral).
Shoulder diagnostic arthroscopy — 1 per encounter.
Shoulder arthroscopic debridement, limited — 1 per encounter.
Shoulder arthroscopic debridement, extensive — 1 per encounter.
Shoulder arthroscopic distal claviculectomy — 1 per encounter.
Shoulder arthroscopic lysis of adhesions — 1 per encounter.
Shoulder arthroscopic acromioplasty — 1 per encounter.
Shoulder arthroscopic rotator cuff repair — 1 per encounter.
Hip diagnostic arthroscopy — 1 per encounter.
Hip arthroscopic chondroplasty — 1 per encounter.
Knee diagnostic arthroscopy — 1 per encounter.
Knee arthroscopic loose body removal — 1 per encounter.
Knee arthroscopic debridement — 1 per encounter.
Knee arthroscopic microfracture — 1 per encounter.
Knee arthroscopic meniscectomy (medial OR lateral) — 1 per encounter.
Knee arthroscopic meniscus repair — 1 per encounter.
Knee arthroscopic lysis of adhesions — 1 per encounter.
Ankle arthroscopic loose body removal — 1 per encounter.
Ankle arthroscopic synovectomy — 1 per encounter.
Ankle arthroscopic debridement — 1 per encounter.
Office visit, new patient, low MDM — up to 2 per day across providers.
Office visit, established, low MDM — up to 4 per day across providers.
Office visit, established, moderate MDM — up to 4 per day across providers.
Office visit, established, high MDM — up to 3 per day across providers.
